title: Snapdeal Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Snapdeal Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Snapdeal Logistics! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Snapdeal Logistics:
Snapdeal Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
